## Test plan

<!-- What you ran to confirm this works — build/test commands, manual checks, screenshots for UI changes. -->

- [ ] `dotnet format --verify-no-changes`
- [ ] `dotnet build`
- [ ] `dotnet test`
- [ ] `npm run build` (if the Angular app is affected)

## Checklist

- [ ] New/changed data-model or architectural decisions are documented in `docs/decisions/` (see the [ADR index](../docs/decisions/README.md))
- [ ] New GitHub issues opened along the way have a type label, `backend`/`frontend` as applicable, an `area:*` label, and a milestone
- [ ] Calendar/lectionary data changes are cited against the BCP 2019 source, not just another tool's output
